predicate.title: Work-scoped token metric and n/a display for missing/inaccurate data
predicate.problem: cache_read_input_tokens is summed across the whole transcript window, so the token metric scales with turns x accumulated session context rather than actual work done for the change -- not work-scoped (finding 2 of roadmap-priority-2-metrics-integrity). Separately, the dashboard silently showed misleading raw values (e.g. negative durations, gross token totals) instead of flagging missing/inaccurate data.
acceptance_criteria: The headline token figure shown in the tile/table/markdown is work-scoped (input + output + cache_creation), excluding cache_read
The full token breakdown including cache_read and the gross total remains available in the chart tooltip for transparency

Dashboard rows with missing or inaccurate data (no usage evidence, negative lead/cycle time from hand-authored timestamps) render as n/a in the table and markdown output instead of a misleading raw value
Median lead/cycle tiles exclude inaccurate rows so a single bad row cannot skew the summary figure
The chart continues to plot the raw historical values (including negative bars) as the honest record; only summary figures are affected
out_of_scope: Finding 3 (shared lead/cycle chart axis) and finding 1 (already shipped via CR-20260715-005)
